title: Sovereign RSI Value-to-Capability Treasury
problem: Accumulated value must not remain inert. It must be governed, budgeted, and reinvested into stronger future capabilities.
mission: Turn verified value into governed capability budgets: successful proof missions produce value signals; value is routed through treasury controls; stronger future proof missions receive budget, talent, tools, and review capacity.
incremental: Adds economic recursion: verified value funds stronger future work.
value: Connects proof to reinvestment, allowing the system to improve its own operating capacity without relying only on manual planning.
plans: Sovereign RSI Value-to-Capability Treasury proof mission plan
rsi: The accepted artifact may influence future work only after evidence, evaluator review, reviewer validation, scope control, challenge window, rollback readiness, Selection Gate approval, and Chronicle entry.
